ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "name_short" TEXT /* Short name of the country */,
  "iso_numeric" INTEGER /* ISO numeric code of the country */,
  "iso_alpha2" TEXT /* ISO alpha 2 code of the country */,
  "iso_alpha3" TEXT /* ISO alpha 3 code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oecd_accession_dates" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accession event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country that accessed the OECD */,
  "accession_date" TEXT /* Date when the country accessed the OECD */,
  "depository_date" TEXT /* Date when the country deposited the accession instrument */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the accession became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oecd_accession_dates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eu_accession_dates" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accession event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country that accessed the EU */,
  "accession_date" TEXT /* Date when the country accessed the EU */,
  "depository_date" TEXT /* Date when the country deposited the accession instrument */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the accession became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eu_accession_dates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cmp" (
  "cmp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CMP entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the CMP entry */,
  "cmp_value" INTEGER /* CMP value for the country */,
  "cmp_source" TEXT /* Source of the CMP data */,
  "cmp_year" INTEGER /* Year when the CMP data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cmp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cmp_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eu_profiler" (
  "profiler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EUPROFILER entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the EUPROFILER entry */,
  "profiler_value" INTEGER /* EUPROFILER value for the country */,
  "profiler_source" TEXT /* Source of the EUPROFILER data */,
  "profiler_year" INTEGER /* Year when the EUPROFILER data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profiler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eu_profiler_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ees" (
  "ees_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EES entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the EES entry */,
  "ees_value" TEXT /* EES value for the country */,
  "ees_source" TEXT /* Source of the EES data */,
  "ees_year" INTEGER /* Year when the EES data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ees_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ees_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morgan" (
  "morgan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Morgan entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Morgan entry */,
  "morgan_value" TEXT /* Morgan value for the country */,
  "morgan_source" TEXT /* Source of the Morgan data */,
  "morgan_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Morgan data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("morgan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morgan_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "castles_mair" (
  "castles_mair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Castles Mair entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Castles Mair entry */,
  "castles_mair_value" TEXT /* Castles Mair value for the country */,
  "castles_mair_source" TEXT /* Source of the Castles Mair data */,
  "castles_mair_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Castles Mair data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("castles_mair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_castles_mair_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "huber_inglehart" (
  "huber_inglehart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Huber Inglehart entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Huber Inglehart entry */,
  "huber_inglehart_value" TEXT /* Huber Inglehart value for the country */,
  "huber_inglehart_source" TEXT /* Source of the Huber Inglehart data */,
  "huber_inglehart_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Huber Inglehart data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("huber_inglehart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_huber_inglehart_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ray" (
  "ray_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Ray entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Ray entry */,
  "ray_value" REAL /* Ray value for the country */,
  "ray_source" TEXT /* Source of the Ray data */,
  "ray_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Ray data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ray_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ray_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chess" (
  "chess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Chess entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Chess entry */,
  "chess_value" INTEGER /* Chess value for the country */,
  "chess_source" TEXT /* Source of the Chess data */,
  "chess_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Chess data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chess_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benoit_laver" (
  "benoit_laver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Benoit Laver entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the Benoit Laver entry */,
  "benoit_laver_value" TEXT /* Benoit Laver value for the country */,
  "benoit_laver_source" TEXT /* Source of the Benoit Laver data */,
  "benoit_laver_year" INTEGER /* Year when the Benoit Laver data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benoit_laver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benoit_laver_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public" (
  "public_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the public entry */,
  "public_value" INTEGER /* Public value for the country */,
  "public_source" TEXT /* Source of the public data */,
  "public_year" INTEGER /* Year when the public data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("public_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment for the country */,
  "comment_author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "old_country_ids" (
  "old_country_id" INTEGER /* Old country ID for the country */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the old country ID */,
  "old_iso_alpha2" TEXT /* Old ISO alpha 2 code for the country */,
  "old_iso_alpha3" TEXT /* Old ISO alpha 3 code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("old_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_old_country_ids_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "classification_value" TEXT /* Value of the classification for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_classifications_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_classification_types" (
  "classification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification type */,
  "classification_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_classification_type_countries" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification type associated with the classification */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_classification_type_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_classification_type_countries_classification_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_type_id") REFERENCES country_classification_types ("classification_type_id")
)
